req.title: Submit leave request
req.statement: A full-time employee shall be able to submit a leave request for between 1 and 30 business days; requests spanning more than 30 days require hr-admin approval.
error_pathways: 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin

tests.name: naive_case

doc._raw_response:
```python

Pytest tests for leave request submission requirement:
- Full-time employees can submit leave requests for 1 to 30 business days.
- Requests spanning more than 30 business days require hr-admin approval.
"""

from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
